long_desc: The innkeeper watches for customers and drinks imported Scotch.
detailed_desc:
Reilly doesn't keep this inn open by sitting and watching the 
goblins invade! He looks more like a hobo than an innkeeper but
you can at least see that he is wearing a huge Scotch sword at
his side.  He is also drinking from a huge bottle of Scotch 
whiskey, probably not the single-malt variety.
